member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.OrDefault(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns when is null, empty, or whitespace-only; otherwise returns unchanged.
member.returns: The original value or the default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.Truncate(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncates the string to at most characters.
member.returns: The original string when it is not longer than ; otherwise the first characters.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.Repeat(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Repeats the string times.
member.returns: A new string that consists of repeated times.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.ContainsIgnoreCase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when contains using a case-insensitive ordinal comparison.
member.exception: Thrown when either argument is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.EqualsAnyIgnoreCase(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Returns true when equals any of the using a case-insensitive ordinal comparison.
member.param: One or more strings to compare against.
member.returns: true if a match is found; otherwise false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Extensions.StringExtensions.SplitAndTrim(System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Splits the string by , trims whitespace from each segment, and removes empty entries.
member.returns: An array of non-empty, trimmed segments.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo
member.summary: This class is a wrapper for basic information about an application.

member.name: P:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.AppName
member.summary: The name of the app. Null, empty, or whitespace-only values are silently coerced to "unknown".

member.name: P:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.AppVersion
member.summary: The version of the app. Null, empty, or whitespace-only values are silently coerced to "unknown".

member.name: P:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.AppBuildDate
member.summary: The build date of the app. Null, empty, or whitespace-only values are silently coerced to "unknown".

member.name: P:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.AppBuildTime
member.summary: The build time of the app. Null, empty, or whitespace-only values are silently coerced to "unknown".

member.name: P:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.AppRuntimeEnvironment
member.summary: The runtime environment in which the app was started. Null, empty, or whitespace-only values are silently coerced to "unknown".

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor for the class. All fields are initialized to "unknown".

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructor for the class. Any null, empty, or whitespace-only argument falls back to "unknown".
member.param: The build date of the app.
The build time of the app.
The runtime environment in which the app was started.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.ToString
member.summary: Converts the information of the object into a human readable string. Format: {AppName} [Version: {AppVersion} - {AppBuildDate} @ {AppBuildTime} | Env: {AppRuntimeEnvironment}]
member.returns: A containing the information of the object.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.op_Equality(jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo,jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are equal.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo.op_Inequality(jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo,jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Types.basic.AppInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether two instances are not equal.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard
member.summary: Provides static guard clauses for validating arguments at method entry points. Each method returns the validated value so it can be used inline in assignments.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNullValue``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws if has no value.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: The unwrapped value when it is not null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null or empty.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is not null or empty.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null, empty, or whitespace-only.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is not null, empty, or whitespace.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNegative(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is negative.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is zero or positive.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.Positive(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is not strictly positive (i.e., <= 0).
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is greater than zero.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.InRange(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if lies outside [, ].
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is within the specified range.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Utilities.Guard.NotNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws if is null or contains no elements.
member.param: The parameter name used in the exception message.
member.returns: when it is not null or empty.
